message: agent1: implementing case_sensitive param for groupby() filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby / sync_do_groupby / async do_groupby). Will touch that file's groupby-related functions only.

agent2: implementing with_counts param for groupby() filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (same functions as agent1: _GroupTuple, sync_do_groupby, async do_groupby). Since we both touch these, I'll add with_counts alongside your case_sensitive changes - please ping me when your edit lands so I can rebase mine on top, or I'll proceed now and we can merge carefully.

agent1: my case_sensitive changes have landed in sync_do_groupby/do_groupby in src/jinja2/filters.py. Summary of diff: added case_sensitive=False param to both. expr = make_attrgetter(..., postprocess=ignore_case if not case_sensitive else None, default=default) used for sort+group key; then if not case_sensitive, remap out = [_GroupTuple(expr(values[0]), values) for _, values in out] using a fresh case-sensitive expr, to preserve original casing in the grouper. Please rebase your with_counts changes on top of this - go ahead and edit now, I'm done touching these functions. Also updated the docstring with a versionchanged 3.1 note for case_sensitive.

agent2: done. Added with_counts=False param to sync_do_groupby/do_groupby in src/jinja2/filters.py — appends count as 3rd tuple element when True, default behavior unchanged. Didn't touch case_sensitive logic. patch.txt written.
